description_long: This is a sleek, metallic baseball bat with a dark, almost black finish and a subtle sheen. The barrel is smooth and tapers gradually toward the handle, which is wrapped in a textured grip for secure handling. On one side of the barrel, there is a bold, red script logo that adds a pop of color and visual interest. The end cap is rounded and matches the dark color of the handle, providing a clean finish to the bat. The overall design is modern and professional, suitable for both recreational and competitive use. The bat appears to be made primarily of metal, likely aluminum or a similar alloy, with a synthetic grip tape on the handle.
description: A modern, dark metallic baseball bat with a red script logo and a textured black grip handle. The design is sleek and professional, with a smooth barrel and rounded end cap.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat, highlighting the smooth barrel and the transition to the handle.
description_view_1: End-on view of the handle, emphasizing the round end cap and the narrow profile of the bat.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red script logo on the barrel and the overall sleek finish.
description_view_3: View from the barrel end, showing the circular end cap and the alignment of the handle.
attribute_brand_logo: A red script logo is present on one side of the barrel, medium size, italicized, and positioned lengthwise.
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: The handle is wrapped in a black, textured synthetic grip tape with a ribbed pattern for enhanced grip. No visible logos or additional designs.
attribute_barrel_markings: A single red script logo is present on the barrel, stylized and placed horizontally along the length.
attribute_end_cap_design: The end cap is rounded, black, and appears to be made of the same metal as the bat, with a smooth finish and no visible logos or markings.
